name: Receipt-led governance
pattern: Every meaningful action writes a tamper-evident receipt
scenario: A harness performs a dependency audit and records all material inputs, outputs, tools, and verdicts.
workflow_steps: Hash inputs and planned outputs before action.
Record agent, model, tool calls, cost, latency, risk, and verdict.
Hash-chain the receipt to the previous receipt.
Expose the receipt for audit and replay.
policy_gates: Material actions without receipts are treated as incomplete.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
